The following events took place in '''1004 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Battles==
*[[Battle of Hoth (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="The Dark Forces Saga">''The Essential Atlas'' places the Battle of Dromund Kaas in 1004 BBY and the Battle of Hoth in 1004-1000 BBY. ''[[The Dark Forces Saga]]'' places Hoth before Dromund Kaas.</ref>
*[[Battle of Dromund Kaas (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Dromund Kaas]]<ref name="TEA" />
*[[Battle of Malrev IV (1004 BBY)|Battle of Malrev IV]]<ref name="TEA" />
